name: anti-poisoning blocks pattern promotion when any consolidated safeguard check raises a flag
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"alice","reviewer":"alice"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --all-checks --enforce 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'promotion_blocked=true' err.txt && grep -q 'flag=self-approval' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
